PROCEDURE: Cesium carbonate (6.65 g, 20.0 mmol) , 4-bromothieno[2,3-d]pyrimidine (2.15 g, 10.0 mmol) , Cesium carbonate (6.65 g, 20.0 mmol)  and BINAP (635 mg, 1.00 mmol)  were dissolved in Dioxane. The mixture was sparged with N2 for 5 minutes. Then Pd2dba3 (373 mg, 500 umol)  was added. The reaction was heated under reflux for 24 hours. After completion of the reaction, the mixture was diluted with EtOAc, washed with water and then brine, dried over Na2SO4 and under vacuum. The crude residue was purified by a silica plug (flushed with EtOAc). Recrystallized from EtOAc to obtain the KL-CC-001 (1.60 g, 72 %) as a white solid.
